message:
🐛 fix: AI Fix workflow now triggers on issue creation with label

Fixed workflow to trigger when:
- Label is added to existing issue (labeled event)
- Issue is created with ai-fix-requested label (opened event)
- Manual workflow dispatch

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@ name: AI Fix with Claude Code
 
 on:
   issues:
-    types: [labeled]
+    types: [labeled, opened]
   workflow_dispatch:
     inputs:
       issue_number:
@@ -17,7 +17,10 @@ permissions:
 
 jobs:
   ai-fix:
-    if: github.event.label.name == 'ai-fix-requested'
+    if: |
+      (github.event_name == 'issues' && github.event.action == 'labeled' && github.event.label.name == 'ai-fix-requested') ||
+      (github.event_name == 'issues' && github.event.action == 'opened' && contains(github.event.issue.labels.*.name, 'ai-fix-requested')) ||
+      (github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch')
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
 
     steps:
